name: @commoncurriculum/ts-surgeon
_version_note: Managed by changesets — never bump by hand. Feature PRs add a .changeset/*.md; merging the bot's 'Version Packages' PR bumps this field (src/version.ts reads it at runtime) and publishes. See .claude/skills/release/SKILL.md.
description: AST-accurate TypeScript/JavaScript refactoring CLI powered by ts-morph
_main_note: The importable entry is the opencode guard plugin (list the package in opencode.json's `plugin` array); the CLI is reached via `bin`, which does not go through `exports`. dist/index.js runs the CLI on import, so it must never be the import target.

scripts.build: pnpm run clean && tsc && shx chmod +x dist/index.js
scripts.prepare: shx rm -rf dist && tsc && shx chmod +x dist/index.js
scripts.test:e2e:hook: pnpm run build && vitest run --config vitest.e2e.config.ts e2e/hook-answer.e2e.test.ts
scripts.test:e2e:guard: pnpm run build && vitest run --config vitest.e2e.config.ts e2e/guard-binary.e2e.test.ts
scripts.test:e2e:tsgo: pnpm run build && vitest run --config vitest.e2e.config.ts e2e/tsgo-answer.e2e.test.ts

author: Common Curriculum
